Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Futher Response To Interrogatories And Impose Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Anthony Hall's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that counsel for plaintiff failed to make a reasonable and good faith effort to resolve the matters in dispute, made evasive responses, and asserted unmeritorious objections. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $790 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Futher Response To Interrogatories And Impose Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Continued To Jul-27-06 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Anthony Hall's Motion to compel further responses to interrogatories is Continued to July 27, 2006 at 10:30 a.m. in Dept. 610.

Parties shall engage in meaningful meet and confer discussions to include resolution of (1) any asserted ambiguity in the definitions employed in the interrogatories; and (2) any portions of the responses which are asserted to be confusing or unintelligible. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT
